{{Infobox character
| name = Helgard Travelers
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Helgard Travelers]] are known to fight on the battlefield.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Helgard Travelers]] wear white-and-blue coats.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Helgard Travelers]] can cast giant, razor-sharp snowflakes and summoned beasts.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
